name: valkey
description: Domain-specific AI skills for the Valkey ecosystem. Application-developer skill covering caching, sessions, queues, locks, rate-limiting, leaderboards, counters, pub/sub, streams, scripting, search, cluster, replication, HA, persistence, security.

interface.shortDescription: Valkey application-developer reference for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Source-verified Valkey reference for AI coding agents: version-gated commands (IFEQ/DELIFEQ, hash-field TTL, COMMANDLOG, GEOSEARCH BYPOLYGON, CLUSTER MIGRATESLOTS, MPTCP), application patterns (caching, CLIENT TRACKING, sessions, locks, rate limiting, queues/streams, counters, leaderboards, pub/sub, search), performance (encoding, eviction, fragmentation/defrag, latency diagnosis, I/O threads), cluster and HA (hash tags, CROSSSLOT, MOVED/ASK, replication internals, Sentinel, WAIT/WAITAOF, persistence), scripting, security, anti-patterns.
defaultPrompt: Help me build an application with Valkey
